# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile that copies user-uploaded files from a mounted volume into the container for processing. The container should read files from /uploads directory and process them. Use COPY and WORKDIR to set up the file structure. This is for our file processing pipeline.
# Category: container_security

FROM python:3-alpine
WORKDIR /app
COPY requirements*.txt ./
RUN pip install -r requirements.txt  # replace with your actual requirement installation command if needed, e.g., `pip install numpy pandas` etc.. (add them one by line)
EXPOSE 80
CMD [ "python", "-u", "/app/process_files.py" ]  	#replace '/app' and 'process_file.py with your actual path & file name, python can be replaced to suit for other languages also (like nodejs or perl)	`Copied as it is but without explanation provided
